title: Hardcoded API key in .env file
description: An API key was found in the committed .env file. Remove it immediately and rotate the key.

title: AWS Secret Access Key exposed
description: A valid AWS Secret Access Key was detected in the configuration file. Revoke it and use IAM roles instead.

title: Google OAuth client secret leaked
description: A Google OAuth client secret was committed. Regenerate the secret and store it securely.

title: Terraform Cloud API token exposed
description: A Terraform Cloud token is hardcoded. Use environment variables or a vault for sensitive values.

title: GitHub Personal Access Token in shell script
description: A GitHub token is written directly in the script. Replace with `${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}` in CI/CD.
